_note: Tier orders priority in the merged (feature+bug) view; explicit array order breaks ties within a tier. Resume ordering set 2026-07-04 (resume-lanes-hardening): the P0 bug 'skip-mcp-test-frontmatter-unquoted-colon' in docs/bugs/queue.json is the absolute merged head (picked first by /lazy-batch's unified driver). Then the three in-progress lane features resume where they left off (tier 1: friction-kpi-registry phases 0-2, parallel-worktree-batch-execution phases 0-5, harness-change-canary-rollback research), then the not-started features in dependency order (tier 2: anti-overfit-design-gate, then build-queue-generalization before build-queue-eta-priority-lanes per the soft dep), then the tail (tier 3: claude-config-ci second-to-last, native-android-pipeline-steering last). CAVEAT: pre-existing Concluded P1/P2 build-queue bugs in docs/bugs/ interleave into the merged view by severity (bug-beats-feature on ties) and are untestable PowerShell in a Linux container. Feature stubs (claude-config-ci: pre-Gemini stub, stub:true) route to interactive /spec at Step 4.5.
